sql.query: SELECT id,versionNumber FROM tbl_workflow_templates WHERE id=:id AND tenantId=:tenantId AND status='published' LIMIT 1

UPDATE tbl_workflows w SET w.workflowTypeId=(SELECT t.id FROM tbl_workflow_types t WHERE t.id=NULLIF(:workflowTypeId,'') AND t.tenantId=w.tenantId AND t.isActive=1 LIMIT 1),w.locationId=(SELECT l.id FROM tbl_locations l WHERE l.id=NULLIF(:locationId,'') AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1),w.spaceId=(SELECT s.id FROM tbl_spaces s WHERE s.id=NULLIF(:spaceId,'') AND s.locationId=NULLIF(:locationId2,'') AND s.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1),w.configurationId=(SELECT c.id FROM tbl_space_configurations c WHERE c.id=NULLIF(:configurationId,'') AND c.spaceId=NULLIF(:spaceId2,'') AND c.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1) WHERE w.id=:workflowId AND w.tenantId=:tenantId

INSERT INTO tbl_workflow_stages (tenantId,workflowId,sourceTemplateStageId,stageName,description,sortOrder,status,colour) SELECT :tenantId,:workflowId,s.id,s.stageName,s.description,s.sortOrder,'not_started',s.colour FROM tbl_template_stages s WHERE s.templateId=:templateId AND s.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND s.status='active' ORDER BY s.sortOrder

INSERT INTO tbl_tasks (tenantId,workflowId,workflowStageId,sourceTemplateTaskId,taskName,description,status,priority,isRequired,assignedToUserId,assignedToTeamId,assignedToRoleId,dueDate,createdByUserId) SELECT :tenantId,:workflowId,ws.id,tt.id,tt.taskName,tt.description,'not_started',tt.priority,tt.isRequired,CASE WHEN tt.defaultOwnerType='workflow_owner' THEN :ownerUser WHEN tt.defaultOwnerType='specific_user' THEN tt.defaultOwnerId ELSE NULL END,CASE WHEN tt.defaultOwnerType='team' THEN tt.defaultOwnerId ELSE NULL END,CASE WHEN tt.defaultOwnerType='role' THEN tt.defaultOwnerId ELSE NULL END,CASE tt.dueOffsetType WHEN 'workflow_creation_date' THEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,INTERVAL (CASE WHEN tt.dueRelation='before' THEN -1 ELSE 1 END)*COALESCE(tt.dueOffsetDays,0) DAY) WHEN 'workflow_start_date' THEN DATE_ADD(NULLIF(:startDate,''),INTERVAL (CASE WHEN tt.dueRelation='before' THEN -1 ELSE 1 END)*COALESCE(tt.dueOffsetDays,0) DAY) WHEN 'event_target_date' THEN DATE_ADD(NULLIF(:targetDate,''),INTERVAL (CASE WHEN tt.dueRelation='before' THEN -1 ELSE 1 END)*COALESCE(tt.dueOffsetDays,0) DAY) ELSE NULL END,:createdBy FROM tbl_template_tasks tt INNER JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.workflowId=:workflowId2 AND ws.sourceTemplateStageId=tt.templateStageId AND ws.tenantId=:tenantId2 WHERE tt.templateId=:templateId AND tt.tenantId=:tenantId3 AND tt.status='active' ORDER BY tt.templateStageId,tt.sortOrder

INSERT INTO tbl_task_dependencies (tenantId,workflowId,taskId,dependsOnTaskId,dependencyType) SELECT :tenantId,:workflowId,t.id,d.id,td.dependencyType FROM tbl_template_task_dependencies td INNER JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.workflowId=:workflowId2 AND t.sourceTemplateTaskId=td.templateTaskId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId2 INNER JOIN tbl_tasks d ON d.workflowId=:workflowId3 AND d.sourceTemplateTaskId=td.dependsOnTemplateTaskId AND d.tenantId=:tenantId3 WHERE td.templateId=:templateId AND td.tenantId=:tenantId4

INSERT INTO tbl_workflow_field_values (tenantId,workflowId,templateCustomFieldId,fieldKey) SELECT :tenantId,:workflowId,f.id,f.fieldKey FROM tbl_template_custom_fields f WHERE f.templateId=:templateId AND f.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND f.status='active'

UPDATE tbl_workflows w SET w.currentStageId=(SELECT ws.id FROM tbl_workflow_stages ws WHERE ws.workflowId=w.id AND ws.tenantId=w.tenantId ORDER BY ws.sortOrder LIMIT 1) WHERE w.id=:workflowId AND w.tenantId=:tenantId

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,workflowId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,afterJson,createdDate) SELECT :tenantId,:userId,:workflowId,'workflow',:entityId,'workflow.created',CONCAT(:displayName,' created ',:workflowName),JSON_OBJECT('workflowName',:workflowName2,'referenceCode',:referenceCode,'status','not_started','ownerTeamId',:ownerTeamId),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tbl_activity_types at WHERE at.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND at.activityKey='workflow.created' AND at.isActive=1 LIMIT 1
